query:
ALTER TABLE `books` ADD CONSTRAINT `books_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `pages` ADD CONSTRAINT `pages_bookId_books_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`bookId`) REFERENCES `books`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
